SyncGIGT

Sync your Github Issues in Google Tasks

Github Repository
Download Release

Loading releases...

Desktop Download
Desktop Installers

SyncGIGT is an AI-assited (Gemini API) tool to synchronize your Github Issues and Google Tasks.

Features

  • AI-assisted (Gemini API)
  • Synchronize your Github Issues and Google Tasks
